Explanation:
Interpreting “the shortest amount … this group did something by” as the smallest winning margin, we check all victories in the results. The team won several matches by a single goal, such as 4–3 (26 Aug 1950), 2–1 (31 Aug 1950), 1–0 (21 Oct 1950), 2–1 (23 Dec 1950), 2–1 (3 Feb 1951), 1–0 (10 Mar 1951), and 1–0 (30 Apr 1951). No win has a margin smaller than 1. Therefore, the shortest amount they won by is 1 goal.
